idea_summary: Initial baseline adapted from prior 16416^3 tuning
BLOCK_K=32 reduced tensor core utilization, performance dropped significantly
256x128 tile worse than 128x256 for this shape
GROUP_M=16 and evict_last improved L2 cache performance
num_stages=4 worse than 3, more stages hurt for short K
128x128x128 square tiles inefficient for this shape
256x256 tiles too large, very poor performance
num_stages=2 too few, insufficient latency hiding
num_warps=4 too few, very poor performance
BLOCK_K=128 fewer iterations, less latency hiding
evict_first better than evict_last for thin-K
64x256 tiles too small for compute efficiency
Split-K with atomic_add has precision issues
